title: A dehumidification system and method
abstract: A dehumidification system has a first desiccant wheel process portion and associated first desiccant wheel regeneration portion. The system also has a second desiccant wheel process portion and associated second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. A closed circuit of gas is in fluid communication with the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion and the second desiccant wheel process portion to regenerate the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion.
claims: Claims 1. A dehumidification system, comprising : a first desiccant wheel process portion and associated first desiccant wheel regeneration portion, a second desiccant wheel process portion and associated second desiccant wheel regeneration portion, and a closed circuit of gas in fluid communication with the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion and the second desiccant wheel process portion to regenerate the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 2. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 1, wherein the first desiccant wheel process portion and/or the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion is composed predominantly of a desiccant material or material having adsorption properties. 3. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 2, wherein the first desiccant wheel process portion and/or the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion is composed predominantly of silica gel. 4. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the second desiccant wheel process portion and/or the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion is composed predominantly of a desiccant material or material having adsorption properties. 5. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 4, wherein the second desiccant wheel process portion and/or the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion is composed predominantly of a silica gel. 6. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the first desiccant wheel process portion is configured to dehumidify a gas passing through it. 7. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the second desiccant wheel process portion is configured to dehumidify a gas in the closed circuit and in fluid communication with the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion, such that the dehumidified gas regenerates the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 8. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion is regenerated by heated gas from an external environment. 9. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, wherein the first desiccant wheel process portion and associated first desiccant wheel regeneration portion are portions of a first desiccant wheel and the second desiccant wheel portion and associated second desiccant wheel regeneration portion are portions of a second desiccant wheel. 10. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 9, wherein the first desiccant wheel and/or the second desiccant wheel has a diameter of between about 100mm and about 4m. 11. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 10, wherein the first desiccant wheel and/or the second desiccant wheel has a diameter of about 550mm. 12. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 11, wherein the first desiccant wheel has a greater diameter than the second desiccant wheel. 13. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 12, wherein the first desiccant wheel and/or the second desiccant wheel has a depth of between about 50mm and about 500mm. 14. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 13, wherein the first desiccant wheel and/or the second desiccant wheel has a depth of about 100mm. 15. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 14, wherein the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion is about a quarter to half of the first desiccant wheel. 16. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 15, wherein the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion is about a quarter to half of the second desiccant wheel. 17. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 16, wherein the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion is about a quarter of the second desiccant wheel. 18. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 17, wherein the rotation speed the first desiccant wheel and/or the rotation speed of the second desiccant wheel is between about 1 revolutions per hour and about 50 revolutions per hour. 19. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 18, wherein the rotation speed the first desiccant wheel and/or the rotation speed of the second desiccant wheel is about 5 revolutions per hour. 20. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 18 or claim 19, wherein the first desiccant wheel and the second desiccant wheel rotate at substantially the same speed. 21. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the first desiccant wheel process portion and associated first desiccant wheel regeneration portion and the second desiccant wheel portion and associated second desiccant wheel regeneration portion are contained within a single wheel. 22. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 21 wherein the single wheel is subdivided radially into a central region having the first desiccant wheel process portion and associated first desiccant wheel regeneration, and an outer region having the second desiccant wheel portion and associated second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 23. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 22 wherein the outer region of the wheel is regenerated by a closed circuit of gas passing from the central region of the wheel to the outer region of the wheel and back to the central region of the wheel. 24. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a condenser. 25. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 24 wherein the condenser is located in the gas flow before the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion, such that the condenser heats gas to a suitably high temperature before it enters the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 26. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a heat recuperator. 27. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 26 wherein the heat recuperator is located in the gas flow before and in the gas flow after the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion, such that the heat recuperator recovers heat from gas exiting the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion and transfers the heat to gas entering the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 28. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a heater. 29. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 28, wherein the heater is located in the gas flow before the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion, such that the heater heats gas to a suitably high temperature before it enters the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. 30. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a refrigerant evaporator. 31. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 30, wherein the refrigerant evaporator is located in the gas flow after the first desiccant wheel process portion, such that the refrigerant evaporator cools gas exiting the first desiccant wheel process portion. 32. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising one or more fans positioned within the gas flow of the system to create a current of air through the gas flow of the system. 33. The dehumidification system as claimed in any one of the preceding claims, further comprising : a third desiccant wheel process portion and associated third desiccant wheel regeneration portion, and a closed circuit of gas in fluid communication with the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion and the third desiccant wheel process portion to regenerate the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion. The dehumidification system as claimed in claim 33, wherein the third desiccant wheel regeneration portion is about a quarter of the third desiccant wheel. 34. A method for dehumidifying a gas, comprising : passing a first humid gas through a first desiccant wheel process portion; passing a gas through a second desiccant wheel process portion and delivering the gas exiting the second desiccant wheel process portion to a first desiccant wheel regeneration portion that is associated with the first desiccant wheel process portion to regenerate the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion; and returning the gas exiting the first desiccant wheel regeneration portion to the second desiccant wheel process portion in a closed circuit. 35. The method for dehumidifying a gas as claimed in claim 35, wherein the method is carried out by the dehumidification system as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 34. 36. The method for dehumidifying a gas as claimed in claim 35 or claim 36, wherein the first humid gas passing through the first desiccant wheel process portion is dehumidified by the first desiccant wheel process portion. 37. The method for dehumidifying a gas as claimed in any one of claims 35 to 37, wherein heated gas is passed from an external environment through the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion to regenerate the second desiccant wheel regeneration portion.
